blended.narrative: Discovery is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 17.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 11" over the past week. Current depth: 50".
